query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A group of people gather on a rocky incline at twilight. A standing figure in the center wears light-colored pants and is positioned near others who are seated lower on the rocks. A bright warm light illuminates the scene from below, casting an orange glow on the rocks and figures. The sky is deep blue, and a white rectangular object sits on the slope to the right.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A group of people on a rocky incline at twilight is captured with extreme motion blur that streaks the standing and seated figures into flowing, overlapping shapes of orange and yellow light, completely dissolving facial features and textures. The frame is tilted at a steep diagonal angle, creating an unstable composition where the rock face and deep blue sky slope sharply across the image.
